heading: Chief of Veterinary Corps
label: 7084 Chief of Veterinary Corps
text: The Chief of the Veterinary Corps of the Army shall be appointed from among officers of the Veterinary Corps.
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior sections 7084 to 7088 were renumbered sections 8584 to 8588 of this title, respectively.

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 3084 of this title2017— struck out at end “An officer appointed to that position who holds a lower grade shall be appointed in the grade of brigadier general.”Pub. L. 115–912016— amended section catchline generally, substituting “Chief of Veterinary Corps” for “Chief of Veterinary Corps: grade”, and struck out second sentence of text which read as follows: “The Chief of the Veterinary Corps serves in the grade of brigadier general.”Pub. L. 114–3282006— substituted colon for semicolon in section catchline.Pub. L. 109–1632003— inserted “shall be appointed from among officers of the Veterinary Corps. The Chief of the Veterinary Corps” after “Army”.Pub. L. 108–136

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

Effective Date of 2003 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 108–136, div. A, title V, § 502(b)117 Stat. 1456Nov. 24, 2003“The amendment made by subsection (a) [amending this section] shall apply to appointments of the Chief of the Veterinary Corps of the Army that are made on or after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Nov. 24, 2003
